headline: Gold overtakes US Treasuries as top global official reserve asset
headline_zh: 黄金超越美债成为全球第一大官方储备资产
narrative: A seismic shift in global reserve composition: for the first time, gold has surpassed US Treasuries as the largest component of official reserve assets worldwide. This milestone, reported by Caixin, underscores accelerating de-dollarization and central banks' pivot to physical assets amid geopolitical uncertainty. Meanwhile, the trial of former Inner Mongolia chairwoman Wang Lixia on corruption charges highlights the Party's ongoing anti-corruption campaign targeting high-ranking officials, signaling that even provincial leaders with significant power are not immune. On the policy front, the government's new childbirth subsidy program commits 110 billion yuan to boost fertility rates, reflecting growing concern over demographic decline. In the tech sector, a micro-joint module startup led by Shenzhen Capital Group raises funds, indicating continued state-backed investment in advanced manufacturing.
narrative_zh: 全球储备构成发生巨变：黄金首次超越美国国债，成为全球官方储备资产最大组成部分。这一里程碑标志着去美元化加速，央行在不确定地缘环境中转向实物资产。与此同时，内蒙古自治区原主席王莉霞因腐败受审，显示反腐高压态势已延伸至正省级高官。政策方面，育儿补贴计划斥资1100亿元，显示对人口下降的担忧。科技领域，深创投领投微型关节模组企业，反映国有资本对高端制造的支持。
